title: stellaria viridescens
intro: Stellaria viridescens, also known as the green-stemmed starwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of Stellaria viridescens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, with the most common herbal preparation being a tea made from the plant's leaves and stems.
